phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get to Fort National
phrases.cultural_note: Fort National is a tidal island fortress accessible only on foot from the city walls at low tide. The walk takes about 15 minutes.

responses.english: At low tide, cross the beach from the ramparts.
responses.phonetic: say par lah, zhoost oh boo duh lah roo
responses.local: À marée basse, traversez la plage depuis les remparts.

phrases.cultural_note: The fort is only accessible at low tide. Check the tide tables locally — you need at least 2 hours of low tide to visit safely.

responses.english: Accessible only at low tide. Check the tide schedule.
responses.phonetic: wee, may ruh-gar-DAY layz oh-REHR ah-fee-SHAY oh-zhoor-DWEE
responses.local: Accessible uniquement à marée basse. Vérifiez les horaires des marées.

phrases.cultural_note: There is a small entrance fee for the guided tour of Fort National.

responses.english: It's indicated at the fort entrance.
responses.phonetic: say an-dee-KAY ah lahn-TRAY doo FOR
responses.local: C'est indiqué à l'entrée du fort.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if it's safe to visit at high tide
phrases.text_local: Est-il dangereux de visiter à marée haute ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL dahn-zhuh-RUH duh vee-zee-TAY ah mar-AY oht
phrases.cultural_note: At high tide, Fort National becomes an island completely surrounded by water. Do NOT attempt to cross when the water is rising.

responses.english: Yes, don't cross when the tide is rising.
responses.phonetic: wee, may lah ray-zair-vah-SYON ahn leen-yuh eh ploo SIMPL
responses.local: Oui, ne traversez pas quand la mer monte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long the visit takes
phrases.text_local: Combien de temps dure la visite ?
phrases.pronunciation: kom-BYAN duh tahn DOOR lah vee-ZEET
phrases.cultural_note: The guided tour is the only way to visit the interior. It covers the main rooms and history.

responses.english: About thirty minutes for the guided tour.
responses.phonetic: ahn-vee-ROHN trahnt mee-NOOT poor lah vee-ZEET gee-DAY
responses.local: Environ trente minutes pour la visite guidée.
